doc_title: LlamaTurk: Adapting Open-Source Generative Large Language Models for Low-Resource Language

items.fact: Future work plans to adapt Llama2 (Touvron et al., 2023b)
items.evidence_span: adapt other opensource language models such as Llama2 (Touvron et al., 2023b)

items.fact: Future work plans to adapt Gemini (Team et al., 2024)
The paper cites 'xquad' (Artetxe et al., 2019) for dataset usage.
items.evidence_span: We use the Turkish question and context subsets of xquad (Artetxe et al., 2019)

items.fact: The paper cites 'databricks-dolly-15k' (Conover et al., 2023) for dataset usage.
items.evidence_span: and the instruction and response subsets of databricks-dolly-15k (Conover et al., 2023)

items.fact: The paper references 'XCOPA' (Ponti et al., 2020) for dataset usage.
items.evidence_span: we use the Turkish subsets of XCOPA (Ponti et al., 2020)

items.fact: The paper references 'Belebele' (Bandarkar et al., 2023) for dataset usage.

items.evidence_span: we fine-tune a multilingual model, MaLA-500 (Lin et al., 2024b).
MaLA is developed to cover 534 languages by using vocabulary extension and continual training on Llama2 (Touvron et al., 2023b).
